backstory.original: Ever since she was a hatchling in her kingdom under the sea, Vlithryn has dreamt of helping the less fortunate land dwellers and spreading the good word of her God, Persana. She’s always willing to lend a helping hand, or a healing word, to those who need it - for the right price of course. She is usually cool, calm, and collected, but don’t get on her bad side, or her banshee scream and lighting attacks will leave you begging for a revivify that you can’t afford.
backstory.display: 自维列瑟琳还是海底王国里的一只幼崽时起，就梦想着帮助那些较为不幸的陆地居民，并传播她的神明佩塞纳的福音。她总是乐于向那些身处困境的人伸出援手，或是给予治愈的话语——当然，对方需要付出与之相称的报酬。她处变不惊、泰然自若，但千万别惹她生气，否则她的女妖尖叫和闪电攻击会让你祈求高不可攀的复活机会。

description.original: Vlithryn attacks a random enemy, dealing 1 hit and knocking them back a short distance.
description.display: 维列瑟琳随机攻击一名敌人，造成 1 次伤害并将其击退一小段距离。

description.original: Vlithryn zaps the enemy with the most Health, empowering her attacks for 15 seconds.
description.display: 维列瑟琳电击生命值最高的敌人，使她的攻击获得 15 秒的强化。

longDescription.original: Vlithryn zaps the enemy with the most remaining Health, and then empowers her attack with lightning for 15 seconds, increasing her attack speed and adding BUD-based damage.
longDescription.display: 维列瑟琳电击剩余生命值最高的敌人，然后用闪电强化她的攻击 15 秒，提高攻击速度并附加基于基础杀招伤害的伤害。

description.desc: Vlithryn increases the damage of all Champions in the columns in front of her by $amount%.
维列瑟琳会使她前列所有勇士的伤害提高 $amount%。
Every second, Vlithryn heals the $optional_targets most damaged Champions for $amount health. This amount is increased by $(not_buffed amount___2)% for each Tanking Champion in the formation.
维列瑟琳每秒为受伤最严重的 $optional_targets 名勇士恢复 $amount 点生命值。阵型中每有一位坦克勇士，此数值提高 $(not_buffed amount___2)%。

tipText.original: Vlithryn increases the damage of Champions in the columns in front of her and heals the most damaged Champion in the formation every second.
tipText.display: 维列瑟琳会提高她前列勇士的伤害，并每秒治疗阵型中生命值最低的勇士。

description.desc: Vlithryn raises her Mace in the air, which is struck by lightning from above. Then the enemy with the most remaining Health is zapped by lightning, dealing ultimate damage. For 15 seconds, her mace is charged with lightning. For the duration, she decreases her base attack cooldown by 3 seconds, and her base attacks deal 3 seconds of bud-based damage with each hit.
维列瑟琳将钉头锤举向空中，降下闪电劈向钉头锤。然后剩余生命值最多的敌人会被闪电击中，受到杀招伤害。钉头锤会充满闪电能量 15 秒。在此期间，她的基本攻击冷却时间减少 3 秒，且每次基础攻击命中都会造成持续 3 秒的基于基础杀招伤害的伤害。
Vlithryn increases the effect of Justice of the Depths by $amount% for each Global Tier Blessing you have unlocked, stacking multiplicatively.
每解锁一个全局层级祝福，维列瑟琳就会使“深渊正义”的效果提升 $amount%，以乘算方式堆叠。

tipText.original: Vlithryn's main damage buff is multiplicatively boosted by the number of Global Tier Blessings you have unlocked.
tipText.display: 维列瑟琳琳的主要伤害增益会根据你已解锁的全局层级祝福数量以乘算方式提升。

description.desc: Vlithryn increases Justice of the Depths' damage bonus by $(not_buffed amount)% for every Champion in the formation with an INT score of 12 or lower, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一位智力低于等于 12 的勇士，维列瑟琳均使深渊正义的伤害加成提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: Life above the waves can seem calm, but it can be just as harsh.
specializationDescription.display: 海浪之上的生活看似平静，但也可能同样严酷。

description.desc: Vlithryn increases Justice of the Depths' damage bonus by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Champion in the formation with a total ability score of 78 or lower, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一位总技能评分低于等于 78 的勇士，维列瑟琳均使深渊正义的伤害加成提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: Ever since she was a hatchling, Vlithryn has dreamed about coming to the surface to help the unfortunate souls that dwell above.
specializationDescription.display: 自维列瑟琳还是一只幼崽时起，她就一直梦想着来到海面之上，去帮助那些生活在海面之上的不幸之人。

description.desc: Vlithryn increases Justice of the Depths' damage bonus by $(not_buffed amount)% for each unique Species in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一位每个独特种族的勇士，维列瑟琳均使深渊正义的伤害加成提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: Vlithryn's faith in Persana is what allows her to make a real impact on the surface.
specializationDescription.display: 维列瑟琳对佩塞纳的信仰，正是让她能够在地表传播他的福音的原因。

description.desc: When a Champion is defeated, Vlithryn consumes a Revivify charge and screams in frustration, pushing back all enemies a short distance. She then casts Revivify and heals the defeated Champion, bringing them back to life at full health. Vlithryn's Revivify charges are equal to the number of Awful Ones in the formation and reset upon changing areas. The effect of Justice of the Depths is increased by $amount% for each Revivify charge used in the current area, stacking multiplicatively.

effect_keys.override_key_desc: When a Champion is defeated, Vlithryn consumes a Revivify charge and screams in frustration, pushing back all enemies a short distance. She then casts Revivify and heals the defeated Champion, bringing them back to life at full health.

description.desc: 当一名勇士被击败时，维列瑟琳会消耗一个“复活术”充能，并懊恼地尖叫，将所有敌人击退一小段距离。然后她会施展“复活术”，治疗被击败的勇士，使其满血复活。维列瑟琳的“复活术”使用次数等同于阵型中“恶人”的数量，并且在更换区域时重置。在当前区域内，每使用一次“复活术”，“深渊正义”的效果就会提升 $amount%，以乘算方式堆叠。

effect_keys.override_key_desc: 当一名勇士被击败时，维列瑟琳会消耗一个“复活术”充能，并懊恼地尖叫，将所有敌人击退一小段距离。然后她会施展“复活术”，治疗被击败的勇士，使其满血复活。

description.desc: Vlithryn gains one Dire Straits stack every time she effectively heals a Champion with Cleric Clinic. When she reaches $persana_stack_num stacks, Persana appears and blesses her with the following:^^- Revivify immediately gains an additional charge^- Justice of the Depths is increased by $(not_buffed amount___2)% for each Dire Straits stack, stacking multiplicatively^- The healing amount of Cleric Clinic is increased by $(not_buffed amount___3)% for each Dire Straits stack, stacking additively.^^Dire Straits stacks continue to increase after Persana appears, up to a maximum of $max_stacks. Upon changing areas, Vlithryn loses up to $stacks_lost_on_area_change Dire Straits stacks, and if her stacks drop below $persana_stack_num, Persana disappears, taking his blessings with him.

effect_keys.override_key_desc: Vlithryn calls for her deity Persana in areas where she effectively heals 30 times, letting her Revivify an additional time, and increase the potency of her main support bonus and healing amount.

effect_keys.total_title: Total Justice of the Depths Bonus

description.desc: 每当维列瑟琳用“牧师诊所”有效地治疗一名勇士时，她就会获得一层“绝境”。当她的层数达到 $persana_stack_num 时，佩塞纳会出现并赐予她以下祝福：^^- “复活术”立即额外获得一次充能。^- 每有一层“绝境”，“深渊正义”的效果增加 $(not_buffed amount___2)%，以乘算方式堆叠。^- 每有一层“绝境”，“牧师诊所”的治疗量增加 $(not_buffed amount___3)%，以加算方式堆叠。^^佩塞纳出现后，“绝境”的层数继续增加，上限为 $max_stacks。更换区域后，维列瑟琳会失去最多 $stacks_lost_on_area_change 层“绝境”层数，如果她的层数少于 $persana_stack_num，佩塞纳会消失，并带走他的祝福。

effect_keys.override_key_desc: 维列瑟琳在有效治疗 30 次的区域召唤她的神灵珀尔萨娜，让她多复活术一次，并提高她的主要辅助奖励和治疗量的效力。

description.original: You're literally dying! Of course I can spare the spell slot.
description.display: 你都快死了！我当然能腾出这个法术栏位来救你。

description.original: How can I help?
description.display: 我能帮上什么忙？

description.original: Did you really think I'd abandon someone in need?
description.display: 你真以为我会抛弃需要帮助的人吗？

description.original: You're lucky I'm here to do your job for you.
description.display: 算你走运，我来这儿帮你完成你的工作。

description.original: Shall I call down lightning to fry them to a crisp?
description.display: 要我召唤闪电把他们烤得外焦里嫩吗？

description.original: It's okay. I'll take care of you.
description.display: 没事的。我会照顾好你的。

description.original: You can repay me by getting back in the fight.
description.display: 你重回战斗就是对我的报答。

description.original: This will only take a moment.
description.display: 一会儿就好。

description.original: A tidal wave? It's a bit much.
description.display: 海啸？有点太过分了吧。

description.original: This is the fourth time today this has happened.
description.display: 这已经是今天第四次发生这种事了。

effects.description: Increases Vlithryn's number of Revivify charges by 2

description.original: I was calling to my god and he answered my prayer!
description.display: 我向我的神明祈祷，而他回应了我的祈求！

description.original: Thanks for having me. I'm really happy to be here.
description.display: 感谢你们接纳我。我真的很高兴能加入这里。

effects.description: Increases the effect of all of Vlithryn's Specializations by $amount%.

description.original: They get in these situations with or without me.
description.display: 不管有没有我，他们都会陷入这种境地。

effects.description: Increases the effect of all of Vlithryn's Specializations by $amount%.

description.original: I'm not just sitting around. I'm helping. I'm killing people!
description.display: 我可不是在闲坐着。我在帮忙呢。我在杀人！

description.original: Please grant me the strength to defeat my enemies.
description.display: 请赐予我击败敌人的力量。

description.original: I summoned it! It's under my control.
description.display: 我召唤出它了！我可以控制它了。

description.original: My faith in Persana allows me to make a real impact on the surface.
description.display: 我对佩塞纳的信仰让我能在地表传播他的福音。

description.original: That is absolutely not going on my head.
description.display: 那绝对不能戴在我头上。

description.original: Ew. I am a priestess of Persana, not some common servant.
description.display: 恶心。我可是佩塞纳的女祭司，可不是什么普通的仆人。

description.original: It's because of Persana that I can save them from drowning.
description.display: 多亏了佩塞纳，我才能把他们从水中救出来。

description.original: May Persana's current guide me through the storm.
description.display: 愿佩塞纳的力量引领我穿越风暴。

description.original: Ahem. You owe me money.
description.display: 咳咳。你还欠我钱呢。

description.original: We appreciate your patronage!
description.display: 感谢您的惠顾！

description.original: It's hard work being a cleric, but it can be rewarding.
description.display: 当牧师很辛苦，但也可能会有回报的。

description.original: Turns out that giant had a pretty big stash of gold.
description.display: 原来那个巨人藏有这么多金子。

description.original: You shouldn't drink that. Don't say I didn't warn you.
description.display: 你不应该喝那个。别说我没警告过你。

description.original: In the name of Persana, Justice of the Depths, I bless this vial.
description.display: 以深渊正义佩塞纳之名，我祝福这个药瓶。

description.original: Persana, if this is the right path for me, send me a sign.
description.display: 佩塞纳，如果这是适合我的道路，请给我降下一个神迹。

description.original: Resurrection spells require a lot of expensive material components.
description.display: 复生术需要很多昂贵的材料。

description.original: Persana, please grant me the strength to make it through another day.
description.display: 佩塞纳，请赐予我力量撑过新的一天。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Vlithryn's Specializations by $(amount)%.

description.original: There we are. All patched up.
description.display: 好了，都修补好了。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Vlithryn's Specializations by $(amount)%.

description.original: To help me survive friendly fire, misadventure, and downright stupidity.
description.display: 助我在友军误伤、意外灾祸以及彻头彻尾的愚蠢行为中活下来。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Vlithryn's Specializations by $(amount)%.

description.original: I have an unbreakable connection with my god.
description.display: 我与我的神明有着牢不可破的链接。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Vlithryn's Specializations by $(amount)%.

description.original: Since I was a hatchling, I dreamed of leaving the sea to help the unfortunate.
description.display: 从我还是一只幼崽起，我就梦想着离开大海去帮助那些不幸的人。

description.original: I underestimated just how much help the unfortunate need.
description.display: 我低估了那些不幸的人到底有多需要帮助。

description.original: Shh! Spoilers.
description.display: 嘘！别剧透。

description.original: You want to see true suffering? How about I cast Inflict Wounds instead?
description.display: 你想见识真正的痛苦吗？不如我改成“施加伤口”法术如何？

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Female Champion in the formation
Increases the damage of all Tiefling Champions by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a WIS score of 11 or higher by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion with a CON score of 13 or higher in the formation
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion in the formation with a CHAOTIC alignment

character_sheet_details.backstory: Ever since she was a hatchling in her kingdom under the sea, Vlithryn has dreamt of helping the less fortunate land dwellers and spreading the good word of her God, Persana. She’s always willing to lend a helping hand, or a healing word, to those who need it - for the right price of course. She is usually cool, calm, and collected, but don’t get on her bad side, or her banshee scream and lighting attacks will leave you begging for a revivify that you can’t afford.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Vlithryn is a Support, Healing, and Control Champion who boosts the damage of Champions in front of her, heals the most injured ally every second, and can revive fallen Champions in moments of dire need.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 自维列瑟琳还是海底王国里的一只幼崽时起，就梦想着帮助那些较为不幸的陆地居民，并传播她的神明佩塞纳的福音。她总是乐于向那些身处困境的人伸出援手，或是给予治愈的话语——当然，对方需要付出与之相称的报酬。她处变不惊、泰然自若，但千万别惹她生气，否则她的女妖尖叫和闪电攻击会让你祈求高不可攀的复活机会。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 维列瑟琳是一名辅助、治疗和控制型勇士。她能提升自己前方勇士的伤害，每秒治疗生命值最低的队友，并且能在情况危急时复活倒下的勇士。

original.name: Blessed Mace
original.description: Vlithryn attacks a random enemy, dealing 1 hit and knocking them back a short distance.

display.name: 神圣战锤
display.description: 维列瑟琳随机攻击一名敌人，造成 1 次伤害并将其击退一小段距离。

original.description: Vlithryn zaps the enemy with the most Health, empowering her attacks for 15 seconds.
original.long_description: Vlithryn zaps the enemy with the most remaining Health, and then empowers her attack with lightning for 15 seconds, increasing her attack speed and adding BUD-based damage.

display.name: 闪电召唤
display.description: 维列瑟琳电击生命值最高的敌人，使她的攻击获得 15 秒的强化。
display.long_description: 维列瑟琳电击剩余生命值最高的敌人，然后用闪电强化她的攻击 15 秒，提高攻击速度并附加基于基础杀招伤害的伤害。

display.name: 牧师诊所

original.name: Pantheon of Blessings
original.tip_text: Vlithryn's main damage buff is multiplicatively boosted by the number of Global Tier Blessings you have unlocked.

display.name: 祝福万神殿
display.tip_text: 维列瑟琳琳的主要伤害增益会根据你已解锁的全局层级祝福数量以乘算方式提升。

original.name: Who Else Would Save Them?

display.name: 还有谁能救他们？

display.description: 我向我的神明祈祷，而他回应了我的祈求！

original.name: Part of the Team
original.description: Thanks for having me. I'm really happy to be here.

display.name: 团队的一员
display.description: 感谢你们接纳我。我真的很高兴能加入这里。

original.name: Babysitter
original.description: They get in these situations with or without me.

display.name: 保姆
display.description: 不管有没有我，他们都会陷入这种境地。

effects.description: 使维列瑟琳所有专精的效果提升 $amount%。

original.name: Minimal Effort Mace
original.description: I'm not just sitting around. I'm helping. I'm killing people!

display.name: 偷懒钉头锤
display.description: 我可不是在闲坐着。我在帮忙呢。我在杀人！

original.name: Acolyte's Cudgel
original.description: Please grant me the strength to defeat my enemies.

display.name: 见习教士的短棍
display.description: 请赐予我击败敌人的力量。

original.name: Spiritual Weapon
original.description: I summoned it! It's under my control.

display.name: 灵能武器
display.description: 我召唤出它了！我可以控制它了。

original.name: Mace of Storms
original.description: My faith in Persana allows me to make a real impact on the surface.

display.name: 风暴钉头锤
display.description: 我对佩塞纳的信仰让我能在地表传播他的福音。

original.name: Rotting Seaweed
original.description: That is absolutely not going on my head.

display.name: 腐烂海藻
display.description: 那绝对不能戴在我头上。

original.name: Kelp Band
original.description: Ew. I am a priestess of Persana, not some common servant.

display.name: 海带束带
display.description: 恶心。我可是佩塞纳的女祭司，可不是什么普通的仆人。

original.name: Shell Tiara
original.description: It's because of Persana that I can save them from drowning.

display.name: 贝壳头饰
display.description: 多亏了佩塞纳，我才能把他们从水中救出来。

original.name: Crown of the Deep
original.description: May Persana's current guide me through the storm.

display.name: 深海王冠
display.description: 愿佩塞纳的力量引领我穿越风暴。

original.name: Not Enough
original.description: Ahem. You owe me money.

display.name: 还不够呢
display.description: 咳咳。你还欠我钱呢。

original.name: Tithe of Tides
original.description: We appreciate your patronage!

display.name: 潮汐什一税
display.description: 感谢您的惠顾！

original.name: Medical Bill
original.description: It's hard work being a cleric, but it can be rewarding.

display.name: 医药费账单
display.description: 当牧师很辛苦，但也可能会有回报的。

original.name: Giant Stash
original.description: Turns out that giant had a pretty big stash of gold.

display.name: 巨人的宝藏
display.description: 原来那个巨人藏有这么多金子。

original.name: Stagnant Vial
original.description: You shouldn't drink that. Don't say I didn't warn you.

display.name: 污浊药瓶
display.description: 你不应该喝那个。别说我没警告过你。

original.name: Holy Sea Water
original.description: In the name of Persana, Justice of the Depths, I bless this vial.

display.name: 圣海水
display.description: 以深渊正义佩塞纳之名，我祝福这个药瓶。

original.name: Seabreeze Incense
original.description: Persana, if this is the right path for me, send me a sign.

display.name: 海风熏香
display.description: 佩塞纳，如果这是适合我的道路，请给我降下一个神迹。

original.name: Clinical Crystals
original.description: Resurrection spells require a lot of expensive material components.

display.name: 诊疗水晶
display.description: 复生术需要很多昂贵的材料。

original.name: Battered Plate
original.description: Persana, please grant me the strength to make it through another day.

effects.description: Increases the effect of Vlithryn's Specializations by $(amount)%.

display.name: 破旧胸甲
display.description: 佩塞纳，请赐予我力量撑过新的一天。

effects.description: 使维列瑟琳所有专精的效果提升 $(amount)%。

original.name: Renewed Plate
original.description: There we are. All patched up.

effects.description: Increases the effect of Vlithryn's Specializations by $(amount)%.

display.name: 翻新胸甲
display.description: 好了，都修补好了。

effects.description: 使维列瑟琳所有专精的效果提升 $(amount)%。

original.name: Mariner's Plate
original.description: To help me survive friendly fire, misadventure, and downright stupidity.

effects.description: Increases the effect of Vlithryn's Specializations by $(amount)%.

display.name: 水手胸甲
display.description: 助我在友军误伤、意外灾祸以及彻头彻尾的愚蠢行为中活下来。

effects.description: 使维列瑟琳所有专精的效果提升 $(amount)%。

original.name: Persana's Stormplate
original.description: I have an unbreakable connection with my god.

effects.description: Increases the effect of Vlithryn's Specializations by $(amount)%.

display.name: 佩塞纳的风暴胸甲
display.description: 我与我的神明有着牢不可破的链接。

effects.description: 使维列瑟琳所有专精的效果提升 $(amount)%。

original.name: Discarded Diary
original.description: Since I was a hatchling, I dreamed of leaving the sea to help the unfortunate.

display.name: 被丢弃的日记
display.description: 从我还是一只幼崽起，我就梦想着离开大海去帮助那些不幸的人。

original.name: Vlithryn's Laments
original.description: I underestimated just how much help the unfortunate need.

display.name: 维列瑟琳的哀叹
display.description: 我低估了那些不幸的人到底有多需要帮助。

original.name: Fifty Shades of Blue
original.description: Shh! Spoilers.

display.name: 五十度蓝
display.description: 嘘！别剧透。

original.name: Necronomicon
original.description: You want to see true suffering? How about I cast Inflict Wounds instead?

display.name: 死灵之书
display.description: 你想见识真正的痛苦吗？不如我改成“施加伤口”法术如何？

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount%
使所有勇士的伤害提高 $amount%

阵型中每有一位女性勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%

使所有提夫林勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%

使所有感知大于等于 11 的勇士伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion with a CON score of 13 or higher in the formation
阵型中每有一位体质大于等于 13 的勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion in the formation with a CHAOTIC alignment
阵型中每有一位混乱阵营勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
